sql_array: CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String);
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (1, 'Region A'), (2, 'Region B'), (3, 'Region C');
CREATE TABLE geo_data (region_id UInt32, parent_region UInt32);

SELECT regionToName(r.id, 'en') || (regionIn(r.id, g.parent_region) ? ' is a child of ' : ' is not a child of ') || regionToName(g.parent_region, 'en') FROM regions AS r JOIN geo_data AS g ON r.id = g.region_id;
